By default, [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIView] and [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIViewController] conform to this protocol in iOS and tvOS, and [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSView] and [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSViewController] conform to this protocol in macOS. # PlaygroundLiveViewable

**Protocol**

A protocol that displays an instance as a live view in a playground.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol PlaygroundLiveViewable
```

## Overview

A playground that presents a simplified user interface programming environment, for example, can make its view-like type conform to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/playgroundsupport/playgroundliveviewable] and appear in the live view. By default, [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIView] and [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIViewController] conform to this protocol in iOS and tvOS, and [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSView] and [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSViewController] conform to this protocol in macOS. You only need to implement this protocol for custom objects that don't already inherit from [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIView], [doc://com.apple.uikit/documentation/UIKit/UIViewController], [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSView], or [doc://com.apple.appkit/documentation/AppKit/NSViewController].

## Displaying Types

- **playgroundLiveViewRepresentation**: The view or view controller used to render and manage the live view.

## Live Views

- **PlaygroundLiveViewRepresentation**: The supported types for displaying for live views in playgrounds.
- **PlaygroundLiveViewSafeAreaContainer**: A protocol that ensures that views fit without obstruction within the Swift Playgrounds user interface.

## Conforming Types

- PlaygroundRemoteLiveViewProxy
